channel.title: Mirage on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in Mirage on Alien Truth Social

item.title: Marfa lights
item.description:
The Marfa lights are an optical phenomenon observed near Marfa, Texas, often seen from a publicized viewing area. Scientific investigations between 2000 and 2008 concluded that these lights are primarily caused by automobile headlights distorted by warm desert air. Historical accounts of the lights date back to 1883, and they have been featured in various media and inspired artistic works.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Marfa_lights
